infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: A-YOS uses the camera only when you choose to attach an issue or review photo.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: A-YOS uses the microphone only when you choose voice issue input or voice messaging.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: A-YOS uses location for service addresses, matching, and active-booking tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: Choose issue or review photos to share with authorized booking participants.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow A-YOS to use your location for nearby matching and active bookings.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow A-YOS to record the voice input you initiate.
